title: dianthus carneus
intro: Dianthus carneus, also known as the flesh-colored pink clover or pink clover, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus carneus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, and its dried flowers can be used in potpourri and other crafts.
